name: Prodigy Public Company Limited
summary: Prodigy Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes polyethylene terephthalate (PET) packaging products in Thailand. It offers PET bottles for drinking water, juices, vegetable oils, seasoning sauces, and other packaging products, as well as preforms. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Nakhon Pathom, Thailand.
